long_description:
[COM]-device-agent pod is not ready [OSA] is Triggered

TIP Situation: Observed Pod Not Ready issue in Genctl-Pod-Not-Ready
TIP Short Description: A pod is not ready for the past 10 minutes

TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-genctl:::mzone2o7:node:osa2-qz1-sr2-rk090-s20
IPOPS Enabled: False

Event Generated:
